githubQuick results from the web:GitHub · Change is constant. GitHub keeps you ahead. · GitHubFrom your first line of code to final deployment, GitHub provides AI and automation tools to help you build and ship better software faster. A Copilot chat ...GitHub·https://github.comGitHub - WikipediaGitHub is a proprietary developer platform that allows developers to create, store, manage, and share their code. It uses Git to provide distributed version ...Wikipedia·https://en.wikipedia.orgGitHub is the world's largest cloud-based developer platform used for storing, managing, and collaborating on software projects. It is built on top of Git, an open-source version control system that tracks code changes.Core Concepts & ToolsRepositories: Cloud-based folders that store a project's files and its entire version history.Commits: Saved snapshots of your code at a specific point in time.Branches: Isolated environments used to develop features without breaking the main codebase.Pull Requests (PRs): Requests to merge your branch changes into the primary codebase, allowing for code reviews.GitHub Actions: Built-in CI/CD tools used to automate testing, building, and deployment workflows.Access & InterfacesYou can interact with the platform through the web interface, the official GitHub Desktop GUI app, or the command-line interface (GitHub CLI). If you already have an account, you can access the GitHub Login Page. If you are new to the platform, you can register via the GitHub Signup Page.To better assist you, what are you looking to do on GitHub?Do you need help setting up a new repository or learning Git commands?Are you looking for help with writing a GitHub Actions workflow?Do you want to learn how to use GitHub Copilot for AI coding assistance?
